codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: backend fields were added with serde defaults, status card and profile switcher render backend type, and ServerStats now renders a vLLM-specific N/A state when slots data is unavailable.

summary: Reviewed feature dashboard-backend-badge for worker session 15070b3b-b80a-48e0-9573-7e09091f72ec via handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 2142ec1 diff. The code changes are consistent with expected behavior and no blocking or non-blocking defects were found.
